executionHistory.summary: Created bug packet (bug.md, spec.md, design.md, scopes.md, report.md, uservalidation.md, scenario-manifest.json). Captured option-(b) deprecation decision with four-bullet rationale.

Documentation-only amendments applied across specs/015-twitter-connector: spec.md (Deferred section + API-strategy banner + goal #5 rewording), scopes.md (Scope 6 → Deferred block, summary table updated, phase order entry marked deferred), uservalidation.md (item 13 → strikethrough non-applicable + disposition update), state.json (status + cert.status → done, scope-6 → Deferred, resolvedBugs entry added, priorReopens preserved), report.md (BUG-015-001 Deprecation Resolution section appended), scenario-manifest.json (created at parent feature root with 6 active scope-level scenarios).

./smackerel.sh test unit EXIT=0 — twitter package 127 sub-tests green; no regressions in any of the 41 Go packages or 330 Python tests. git diff --name-only HEAD -- internal/connector/twitter/ returns empty (no production code touched).

jq assertions confirm state.json status/cert.status=done, completedScopes=scope-01..05, scope-6 status=Deferred with deferredReason and deferredAt, resolvedBugs contains BUG-015-001 with priorReopens history. grep confirms no [ ] VERIFIED FAIL markers remain anywhere in spec. uservalidation item 13 is strikethrough non-applicable. spec.md Deferred section + API-strategy banner present.

bash .github/bubbles/scripts/artifact-lint.sh specs/015-twitter-connector EXIT=0. bash .github/bubbles/scripts/traceability-guard.sh specs/015-twitter-connector EXIT=0 (scenario-manifest cross-check now passes after manifest creation).
Bug closed. Status promoted to done with real captured evidence. Deprecation applied across all 015 artifacts. Parent spec status: in_progress → done. Scope 6 retired as Deferred / Non-Goal.

completedScopes: Scope 1: Document the deprecation across all 015-twitter-connector artifacts

notes: Documentation-only deprecation of Twitter API polling path. Option (b) selected: archive-import path (127/127 tests green) is the certified surface; API path retired as Non-Goal. All amendments preserve historical context — R-008 + SCN-TW-005 relocated to a Deferred section, Scope 6 moved to Deferred status with rationale block, uservalidation item 13 strikethrough with bug back-link. No production code under internal/connector/twitter/ was modified.
